response.original_title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars - The Siege of Mandalore
response.overview: Ahsoka contacts Anakin and Obi-Wan, who must decide whether to help her pursue Maul on Mandalore or defend Coruscant. Ahsoka leads Republic clones to confront Maul's forces on Mandalore. Maul senses the impending chaos and makes a calculated play to ensure his own survival. After capturing Maul on Mandalore, Ahsoka's journey to the Jedi Council is disrupted when Order 66 is declared, turning her world upside down. Ahsoka and Rex must use their wit and skills to survive the turbulent end of the Clone Wars.
response.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars - The Siege of Mandalore
